holdings.name: Zomato
holdings.description: High-momentum food-tech leader. Blinkit quick-commerce driving re-rating. Consistent 12-month price momentum qualifies for Nifty 200 Momentum 30 index.

holdings.name: Trent Ltd
holdings.description: Zudio rapid store expansion driving exceptional earnings growth. One of India's best momentum stories across consumer discretionary.

holdings.name: BSE Ltd
holdings.description: Derivatives volume surge and GIFT City expansion creating multi-year price momentum. Consistent earnings upgrades.

holdings.name: Indian Hotels
holdings.description: Tata's Taj brand re-rating on leisure travel boom. New hotel openings and Qmin food delivery brand adding revenue streams.

holdings.name: Torrent Power
holdings.description: Regulated utility with merchant exposure. Ahmedabad and Surat distribution franchise. Renewable capacity addition driving 15-18% earnings CAGR.

holdings.name: IRCTC
holdings.description: Monopoly railway catering and internet ticketing. Convenience fee regime fully restored. Travel boom post-COVID driving sustained momentum.

holdings.name: PB Fintech
holdings.description: India's largest insurance aggregator achieving path-to-profitability ahead of schedule. Institutional accumulation supporting price momentum.

holdings.name: Persistent Systems
holdings.description: Mid-cap IT with consistent above-peer revenue growth. GenAI positioning and US healthcare vertical driving multi-year earnings momentum.

holdings.name: Dixon Technologies
holdings.description: India's largest electronics manufacturer. PLI scheme beneficiary assembling Samsung, Motorola phones. Laptop and set-top-box expansion.

holdings.name: Coforge
holdings.description: BFSI-focused IT services with consistent deal wins. Revenue growth above tier-1 peers. Strong order book visibility across insurance and banking verticals.
